metadata.court: Special Court for Economic Offences, Ahmedabad

content:
IN THE COURT OF SPECIAL JUDGE, ECONOMIC OFFENCES, AHMEDABAD

CHARGE SHEET UNDER SECTION 173 CrPC

Accused:
1. Arjun Mehta (CFO, VedaCorp)
2. Priya Desai (Senior Finance Executive)
3. Rajiv Nair (Head of Finance)
4. Karan Verma (IT Manager)
5. Mr. Ramesh Gupta (Auditor, Ramesh & Associates)

Charges:
1. Section 420 IPC – Cheating
2. Section 467 IPC – Forgery of valuable security
3. Section 468 IPC – Forgery for purpose of cheating
4. Section 471 IPC – Using as genuine a forged document
5. Section 120B IPC – Criminal conspiracy
6. Section 13(1)(d) of Prevention of Corruption Act, 1988 – Criminal misconduct by public servant (applies to auditor as public servant under Section 2(c) of PCA)

Facts:
Accused conspired to inflate VedaCorp’s financials by fabricating ₹18.7 crore in revenue from non-existent clients. Digital signatures were forged, bank confirmations fabricated, board minutes backdated, and auditor bribed. Funds were laundered through NexaWave LLP to purchase Dubai property. Three employees were silenced via coercion. Evidence includes digital forensics, financial trails, audio recordings, and forged documents. All accused acted in concert. Prima facie case established. Evidence is admissible. Request for trial.
